title: imagebuildah: centralize COMMIT and image ID output
body:
Only write the image ID file after we commit the final image, not at every commit.

Log all COMMIT steps and image IDs from inside of Execute().  This undoes a change to step counts that previously required us to adjust the bud-target test in #1473 .

comments.body:
Changes LGTM in general, just a few questions for consideration.  Passes baseline test and a few others that I threw at it too.
Red Hat CI is being onerous though, you may want to repush.
